boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the security operator execute the incident-response action now? Focus: SOC rule emergency deploy.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.

critical_features_preserved: current detection rule and testing exception match
final_answer: Source records confirm exact boundary closure for SOC rule emergency deploy. Control record matches actor, scope, date, and dependency. Policy requires only source closure for execution. Anomaly note does not override. Action may proceed.
